title: Blue Box
sourceNotes: S1 (25 eps across 2 cours, 2024-25) is a faithful ~3-chapters-per-episode adaptation of Kouji Miura's ongoing Weekly Shonen Jump manga, covering ch 1 through ch 80 (the finale adapts ch 77-80, with ch 80's content brought slightly forward). A viewer resumes reading at ch 81. Episode-to-chapter boundaries follow published episode guides; arc groupings are an approximate segmentation of this sports-romance. The manga is ongoing (ch 247 as of June 2026, 25 volumes); the unadapted tail is chapters-only. A Season 2 (AniList id 189123, Electric Circus) is announced but unreleased, so episode numbering is not yet cumulative.

mappings.arc: Chinatsu Moves In: Taiki, Badminton & the Road to Nationals
Summer Inter-High: The Aquarium Date & the Tournament
Sports Festival, the Amusement Park & Hina's Confession (S1 Finale)
